reviews.review_title: Do you want a thrill? THIS IS FOR YOURS.
reviews.review_description: Great rope action is waiting for you. And shooting game.

I was actually looking forward to playing this and when I did there's no smooth turning which is better for my eyes and also why the heck aren't achievements unlocking when they should be, unless developers fix/update these issues I wouldn't bother

Update : well there was a patch and nothing has been fixed achievements still won't unlock, I will most likely be refunding this game and I would encourage others not to purchase this unless they actually do something about it

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the feedback! We've already fixed the achievement issue and confirmed it's working fine now!

Hope you enjoy playing Wolf and Pigs!

reviews.review_description:
Love the story so far and like the way it's told
Cartoon graphics suit this really well
It's got a bit of everything puzzle solveing shooting blocking  swinging just like spiderman
